name: Devil's Due

time.condition: which you take when another creature within range takes damage

entries: You absorb a measure of a creature's suffering and escaping vital essence. Expend and roll one {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB|Hit Points Die}. You regain a number of {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} equal to the number rolled plus your spellcasting ability modifier.
If the creature took damage from a {@variantrule Critical Hit|XPHB}, double the number of {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB} you regain.

entriesHigherLevel.name: Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot
entries: You can expend one additional {@variantrule Hit Point Dice|XPHB|Hit Points Die} for each spell slot level above 1.
